program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Introducing a colleague or director to an international partner -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Introducing & Presenting Other People
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 5 -- Introducing & Presenting Other People

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Einstein. My name is Laura, and I am your host today. It is a pleasure to have you here. Let me introduce our team. Dr. Costa is our medical director. She leads the oncology department. Mr. Reis is responsible for research. Our guests will meet everyone after the tour. Please follow me, and enjoy your visit.

Hi Fernando, this is David. I want to introduce our new team member. His name is Paulo. He works in our research group, and he leads the new clinical study. He is responsible for the budget and the reports. Please welcome him as our guest next week. It is a pleasure to have him on the team. Call me back. Thanks.
